title: Communication
subtitle: Messengers and channels that reach your master agent

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Incoming messages go straight to your master agent. 1:1 chats only, no media yet.
whatsapp.qr_hint: Open WhatsApp → Linked devices → Scan this code
whatsapp.bridge_unavailable: Bridge unavailable — install Node.js and run 'npm install' in the bridge directory.

filter.title: Filter & permissions
filter.intro: These settings apply to your WhatsApp connection. Owners bypass all filters.
filter.owner_hint: Owners see everything, even without keyword/whitelist.
filter.allowed_hint: If set: only these numbers may write.

discord.label: Discord
discord.description: DMs and @mentions go straight to your master agent.

filter.title: Filter & settings
filter.intro: Token, filters and behavior for your Discord bot.
filter.token_hint: Discord Developer Portal → Bot → Token. 'Message Content Intent' must be enabled.
filter.setup_toggle: How to set up the bot
filter.setup_step1_title: 1. Create a bot & get the token
filter.setup_step1_body: Open the Discord Developer Portal → «New Application» → «Bot» on the left → «Reset Token» → copy the token and paste it above.
filter.setup_step2_body: In the Bot tab under «Privileged Gateway Intents», enable «Message Content Intent» and save. Without it the bot won't connect.
filter.setup_step3_title: 3. Invite the bot to your server
filter.setup_step3_body: OAuth2 → URL Generator → select scope «bot» → permissions «View Channels», «Send Messages», «Read Message History» → open the generated URL → pick your server → authorize.
filter.setup_step4_body: Click «Connect» above. Then DM the bot or @mention it in a channel — it only replies to DMs and @mentions.
filter.allowed_users_hint: If set: only these Discord user IDs may write.
filter.blocked_users_hint: These user IDs are always ignored.
filter.allowed_channels_hint: If set: only reply in these channels.
